summary: Tested Judge Profile Integration feature. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified via Playwright. The Judge Intelligence Panel displays correctly with all required data. One spec discrepancy noted: test spec #3 says Justice Arun Kumar Mishra should show 'D overall grade' but actual data shows 'F' — spec error, not code error.
action_items: Minor spec discrepancy: test requirement #3 says 'Justice Arun Kumar Mishra' shows 'D overall grade badge' but actual seeded data gives this judge an F grade (bias_score=81, overall=F). Justice Hemant Gupta is D. This appears to be a spec error, not a code bug — no action needed unless the seed data is intentionally wrong.
critical_code_review_comments: build_judge_profile_text() correctly includes report card grades, outlier score, bias indicators, temporal patterns, and comparable cases — implementation verified in llm_council.py lines 418-473
run_council_analysis() correctly fetches judge by partial name regex, stores snapshot in analysis doc, and passes full profile to synthesize_chief_justice()
seed_data_creation: Used pre-seeded case 418b1705-866e-4a72-863a-a11051dd43d0 with Justice Hemant Gupta judge snapshot
context_for_next_testing_agent: Judge profile integration fully working. 6 seeded judges in /api/judges (MOCKED data). Pre-completed case 418b1705-866e-4a72-863a-a11051dd43d0 has judge_profile_snapshot for Justice Hemant Gupta (D grade, HIGH RISK, bias_score=74). Case 8df151be-181c-48bf-bee1-a412d9fecbf5 has no judge_profile_snapshot (analyzed before feature). JudgeIntelligencePanel renders correctly in AnalysisDashboard sidebar. Stage >= 3 shows green synthesis note.
features_verified: /submit shows dropdown with 6 judge names + 'Other / Not Listed'
Selecting a judge with DB profile shows judge-profile-found callout
Selecting 'Other / Not Listed' shows NO callout
judge_profile_snapshot stored in analysis with all required fields (id, name, court, bias_score, bias_risk, report_card.overall, temporal_patterns.monday_effect, temporal_patterns.lunch_effect)
JudgeIntelligencePanel renders for case with snapshot
Panel shows: judge name, D grade badge, HIGH RISK badge, 74/100 bias score, Report Card strip (Caste/Gender/Socio/Recid/Geo), Key Indicators
Panel shows TEMPORAL RISK section with Monday Effect and Post-lunch
Stage 4 case shows green synthesis note
Cases without judge_name have no judge_profile_snapshot
